## Testing Checklist

- [ ] `npm run lint` passed
- [ ] `npm run build` passed
- [ ] `npx prisma validate` passed for backend/schema changes
- [ ] `npx prisma generate` passed for backend/schema changes
- [ ] No browser console errors
- [ ] Navigation works
- [ ] Loading states reviewed
- [ ] Error states reviewed
- [ ] Empty states reviewed
- [ ] Mobile tested
- [ ] Desktop tested

## Security & Provider Checklist

- [ ] No `.env`, `.env.local`, or real secrets committed
- [ ] Secret keys remain server-side only
- [ ] Raw provider responses are not exposed publicly
- [ ] Provider failures are handled gracefully
- [ ] README or `.env.example` updated if configuration changed
